payload.answer: Unable to extract article memory because the source could not be fetched (404 network error).
payload.decision: Do not commit article content as durable memory because the fetch failed with a 404 network error; only preserve the retrieval failure context.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be resolved due to a fetch failure, so no durable article entity should be committed.

payload.intent: Remember article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch the article at https://example.com/missing failed with a 404 network error.

details: No article content available for memory extraction.

repair_options: If the article text is available elsewhere, provide the content directly for extraction.
Store only the retrieval-failure note if operational context is desired.
